title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Medical Officer at Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd has an exciting opening for a Medical Officer at our Visakhapatnam office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Suven Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
